MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Deep Fox and Foxtrot project in Canada dated December, 2021.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Deep Fox and Foxtrot project in Canada dated December, 2021.pdf
document.description: A detailed technical report prepared by SLR Consulting (Canada) Ltd. for Search Minerals Inc., providing an independent analysis and Mineral Resource estimation for the Deep Fox and Foxtrot Rare Earth Element (REE) Project located in Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada.
